SessionStart.comment: PM CONDUCTOR: Inject the project briefing (active epic, detour stack, next-up) on startup, resume, and AFTER auto-compaction (source=compact). No-ops silently in projects that have not run /pm:init.

PreCompact.comment: PM CONDUCTOR: PreCompact cannot inject context, so snapshot the freshest state (re-render PROJECT.md + write .conductor/brief.txt) right before the window collapses.

PostToolUse.comment: PM CONDUCTOR: After a git commit, re-render the index and nudge to update epic status / pop a finished detour. Non-blocking.

PreToolUse.comment: PM CONDUCTOR: optional, opt-in gate guard (off by default — enable with `set-gate-guard on`). Blocks Edit/Write/NotebookEdit while the active epic still owes a reconcile after a detour POP. Dormant until /pm:init.
